description: Style Note  For those who don't want the hassle of tying laces, chill out in style and revel in comfort with these black sandals from coolers. With their padded footbed and strong grippy outsole, your journey in this footwear will be an assuredly awesome one.Product Details Thick black strap covering the midfoot and forefoot with openings for more breathability  Decorative stich detail on the strap  Toe holder for enhanced grip and comfort Padded footbed with reverse nubs for proper Fit TPU outsole with patterned and deep groovesHas an appraised heel
